data.content: Plan needs one revision before implementation: the proposed TOML/JSON unknown-artifact tests only assert load-success and output preservation, so they would not catch a regression from warning-on-unknown to silent acceptance. Amend gap 1 to verify warning emission (or refactor to make it observable) while keeping the non-reject/backward-compat assertions. The rest of the plan is feasible and aligned with the current code paths; no invariant, security, or performance issues found.
